ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "inst_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "opeid" INTEGER /* OPEID (Office of Postsecondary Education ID) */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region of the institution */,
  "locale" INTEGER /* Locale of the institution (e.g., City: Midsize) */,
  "ownership" TEXT /* Ownership type (e.g., Public, Private non-profit) */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Degree type offered (e.g., Graduate, Undergraduate) */,
  "control" INTEGER /* Control type (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "women_only" INTEGER /* Whether the institution is women-only */,
  "men_only" INTEGER /* Whether the institution is men-only */,
  "inst_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  "inst_accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "inst_accreditation_agency" TEXT /* Accrediting agency for the institution */,
  "inst_accreditation_date" TEXT /* Accreditation date of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution type */,
  "type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the institution type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locales" (
  "locale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locale */,
  "locale_name" TEXT /* Name of the locale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the locale */,
  "locale_code" TEXT /* Code for the locale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "dem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "sat_avg_all" REAL /* Average SAT score */,
  "pctpell" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving Pell grants */,
  "pctfloan" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving loans */,
  "adm_rate_all" REAL /* Admission rate */,
  "ug" INTEGER /* Number of undergraduate students */,
  "dem_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was collected */,
  "sat_avg_math" REAL /* Average SAT math score */,
  "sat_avg_reading" REAL /* Average SAT reading score */,
  "sat_avg_writing" REAL /* Average SAT writing score */,
  "pctPELL_grant" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving PELL grant */,
  "pctFSEOG_grant" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving FSEOG grant */,
  "pctother_grant" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving other grants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "avgfacsal" REAL /* Average faculty salary */,
  "compl_rpy_5yr_rt" REAL /* 5-year repayment rate */,
  "debt_mdn" INTEGER /* Median debt amount */,
  "aid_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial aid data was collected */,
  "avgfacsal_tenure" REAL /* Average faculty salary for tenure track */,
  "avgfacsal_nontenure" REAL /* Average faculty salary for non-tenure track */,
  "compl_rpy_3yr_rt" REAL /* 3-year repayment rate */,
  "compl_rpy_10yr_rt" REAL /* 10-year repayment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition" (
  "tuition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "amount" REAL /* Tuition amount */,
  "tuition_date" TEXT /* Date when the tuition data was collected */,
  "instate_tuition" REAL /* In-state tuition amount */,
  "outstate_tuition" REAL /* Out-of-state tuition amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tuition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the institution */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the institution was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "median_hh_inc" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "locale_short" TEXT /* Locale short name (e.g., City) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date when the additional data was collected */,
  "median_earnings_6yr" REAL /* Median earnings 6 years after graduation */,
  "median_earnings_10yr" REAL /* Median earnings 10 years after graduation */,
  "pct_completion_2yr" REAL /* Percentage of students completing 2-year programs */,
  "pct_completion_4yr" REAL /* Percentage of students completing 4-year programs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_data_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "deg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the degree */,
  "deg_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree */,
  "deg_level" TEXT /* Level of the degree (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "deg_length" TEXT /* Length of the degree (e.g., 2 years, 4 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "course_credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "fac_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution employing the faculty member */,
  "fac_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "fac_title" TEXT /* Title of the faculty member */,
  "fac_department" TEXT /* Department of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fac_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution having the department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution having the campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "campus_address" TEXT /* Address of the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campuses_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)
